zh.lifeSummary: 當Iseult de Grey於大約1285年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾維爾頓時，她的父親Baron John de Grey28歲，母親Maud de Verdun30歲。她於1308年與Urian St. Pierre結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1370年5月享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Iseult de Grey于大约1285年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾維爾頓时，她的父亲Baron John de Grey28岁，母亲Maud de Verdun30岁。她于1308年与Urian St. Pierre结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1370年5月享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Iseult
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isolde  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Iseult de Grey was born about 1285, in Wilton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Baron John de Grey, was 28 and her mother, Maud de Verdun, was 30. She married Urian St. Pierre in 1308. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in May 1370, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Iseult de Grey est née environ 1285, à Wilton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Baron John de Grey, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Maud de Verdun, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Urian St. Pierre en 1308. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en mai 1370, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Iseult de Grey um 1285 in Wilton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baron John de Grey 28 und ihre Mutter Maud de Verdun 30. Sie hat 1308 Urian St. Pierre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb im Mai 1370 im Alter von 86 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Iseult de Grey è nata il circa 1285 nel Wilton, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Baron John de Grey, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Maud de Verdun, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Urian St. Pierre nel 1308. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel maggio 1370, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Iseult de Greyが約1285年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィルトンで生まれた時，父Baron John de Greyは28歳，母Maud de Verdunは30歳であった。1308年にUrian St. Pierreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1370年5月に86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Iseult de Grey(이)가 대략 1285년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 윌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baron John de Grey(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Verdun(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1308년 Urian St. Pierre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1370년 5월 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Iseult de Grey nasceu aproximadamente 1285, em Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Baron John de Grey, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Verdun, tinha 30 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Iseult de Grey родилась около 1285 г. в местности уилтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Baron John de Grey было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Verdun, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Urian St. Pierre в 1308 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла май 1370 г. в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Iseult de Grey nació aproximadamente 1285, en Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Baron John de Grey, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Maud de Verdun, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Urian St. Pierre en 1308. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en mayo de 1370, a la edad de 86 años.
